name: mile12warrior-mobile
description: Mile 12 Warrior - Mobile App for Android & iOS

scripts.cap:build:android: npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:build:ios: npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.setup:android: npx cap add android && npx cap sync android
scripts.setup:ios: npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios
scripts.setup:all: npx cap add android && npx cap add ios && npx cap sync

author: Mile 12 Warrior LLC
